title: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 - Overview

detail.title: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 released at sebexam.org and ojas.gujarat.gov.in. Download OMR sheet, check responses, calculate marks and know objection process.

content.text: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 has been released for the TAT-S prelims exam held on 3rd May 2026, and candidates can now download their OMR sheet and official answer key from sebexam.org and ojas.gujarat.gov.in using their roll number and date of birth.

The State Examination Board (SEB), Gujarat has activated the link for the Gujarat TAT Secondary (TAT-S) OMR Sheet / Answer Key 2026 so that aspirants can verify their responses and estimate their scores before the declaration of the result.

sections.heading: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 - Overview

content.text: The key details of the Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 are given below for quick reference.

rows: Online download using roll number and date of birth

sections.heading: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 Download Link
Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 PDF (Gujarati Medium)

items: Common Paper Answer Key PDF
Agriculture Answer Key PDF
Computer Answer Key PDF
English Answer Key PDF
Gujarati Answer Key PDF
Hindi Answer Key PDF
Science & Technology – Maths Answer Key PDF
Physical Education Answer Key PDF
Sanskrit Answer Key PDF
Social Science Answer Key PDF

sections.heading: How to Download Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026?

content.text: To avoid errors and login issues, candidates should carefully follow the official steps while downloading the OMR sheet and answer key.
Step-by-Step Process to Download OMR Sheet / Answer Key

items: Go to the official website www.sebexam.org or www.ojas.gujarat.gov.in.
On the homepage, look for the link “Gujarat TAT Secondary 2026 OMR Sheet / Answer Key” or related advertisement under the Answer Key / OMR section.
Click on the link and select “TAT-S Exam” from the drop-down, if prompted.
Enter your roll number or application number and your date of birth exactly as printed on the admit card.
Click the “Download” or “Submit” button to view your OMR sheet with the official correct answers.
Save the OMR sheet/answer key PDF on your device and take a printout for detailed analysis of your performance.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key / OMR Sheet

content.text: The Gujarat TAT Secondary OMR sheet and answer key carry all essential exam and candidate-related details in one place. After downloading the PDF, candidates will find:

items: Candidate name, roll number and basic exam details such as exam name and date.
Question booklet or series code, if applicable.
Question-wise responses marked by the candidate during the TAT-S exam.
Official correct option for each question as provided by SEB Gujarat in the answer key.

content.text: This makes it easier to cross-check answers and understand exactly where marks are gained or lost.

sections.heading: How to Calculate Marks Using Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026?

content.text: Using the provisional answer key correctly helps candidates predict their result before the official scorecard is published.
Step-by-Step Marks Calculation Method

items: Download your individual OMR sheet and the official answer key for your subject and booklet series.
For each question, compare the option you marked with the correct option mentioned in the answer key.
Count the total number of correct responses; multiply this by the marks allotted per question as mentioned in the exam notification.
If the exam has negative marking, subtract the prescribed marks for every wrong answer to avoid overestimating your score.
The final figure is your approximate score in the Gujarat TAT Secondary Prelims Exam 2026; the actual result will be prepared by SEB based on the final answer key.

rows: Last Date to Download OMR Sheet

content.text: Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly so that they do not miss any updates related to objection dates, final key and result.

sections.heading: Gujarat TAT Secondary Answer Key 2026 - Objection / Challenge Process

content.text: If a candidate finds any discrepancy in the provisional answer key, they may get the option to challenge it within a limited time. SEB Gujarat generally provides an online objection link on the official portal, along with detailed instructions and schedule.

sections.heading: How to Raise Objections Against TAT-S Answer Key?

items: Visit the SEB official website and open the Gujarat TAT Secondary provisional answer key/objection link when it is activated.
Log in using your credentials and select the question(s) you want to challenge, providing a valid explanation and supporting proof where required.
Pay the objection fee per question (if prescribed) through the available online payment modes as per official rules.
SEB examines all objections and then releases the final answer key, which forms the basis of the TAT Secondary result.

content.text: Candidates should rely only on the official notice for exact fees, last date and format of representation.
